creator: wgac@wp.pl
text:
I used the ports collection to build Opera 10.61. It works fine, but when i exit - either by Ctrl+Q or by closing the window - a window appears and asks if i want to send a bug report. I also use Opera on Arch Linux (built from AUR) and it behaves properly. I'm not sure if it is a problem with the port or with Opera itself, so I am posting it here.

How-To-Repeat: Install opera from /usr/ports/www/opera, the run it and try to exit.
